title: Minutetech Overlay
description: Vanilla-style Minecraft pack inspired by Minutetech and others, with credits included. Smooth visuals for SMP, PvP, and grinding.
body:
# Minutetech Overlay
This texture pack gives Minecraft a vanilla-like, smooth, and clean look, perfect for SMP, PvP, and grinding. It was inspired by the YouTuber **Minutetech**, and I created my own version using elements from **other packs**, with **full credits given** to their **creators**.
- This is all from **Minutetech's** video; I tried my best to **recreate it fully**.

## Compatibility
- Tested on: 1.21.8 – 1.20.6 (Main version: 1.21+)
- Other versions: not tested

## Requirements
- **No mods required**, this pack works on vanilla Minecraft.

## Credits
- Pack created by **[_Melted](https://modrinth.com/user/_Melted)**.
- Some parts were taken from website called **[Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)**.
- Dark GUI From **[Darkomizer](https://darkomizer.com/)**.
- Low Shield From **[Low Shield](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/low-shield-pack)**.
- Inspired by **[Minutetech](https://www.youtube.com/@minutetechmc)**.
